summaryEn: Located in Seattle's Central Park area, Florera offers 59 high-quality apartments. Acquired in 2017 with successful value enhancement.
summaryZh: 位于西雅图 Central Park 区域，提供 59 套高品质公寓。2017 年收购后成功实现价值提升。
bodyEn: Located in Seattle's Central Park area, Florera offers **59 high-quality apartments**. Acquired in 2017 with successful value enhancement.
bodyZh: 位于西雅图 Central Park 区域，提供 **59 套高品质公寓**。2017 年收购后成功实现价值提升。
